top_signals.title: More LNG, Japan-linked vessels transit Hormuz despite renewed Mideast tensions
top_signals.summary: The Strait of Hormuz, a key route for global shipments, has been closely watched by shipping companies ‌and governments following this week's attacks between Iran and the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New EU ‘scale-up’ fund expects to burst past its €5bn target size
top_signals.summary: Also in this newsletter: IEA urges Brussels to reconsider its opposition to Arctic oil and gas exploration
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: XRP up 2% as buyers push through $1.10 resistance
Uncertain health of main stars sets the stage for wild ride in Nagoya
top_signals.summary: It won't be until a few days into the upcoming meet that we'll really know whether or not the two yokozuna, or now-sekiwake Aonishiki, will be in the title race.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New Helix vishing group emerges in SharePoint data theft attacks
top_signals.summary: A new data-extortion group called Helix is using identity-focused tactics such as voice phishing (vishing), device code phishing, and multi-factor authentication (MFA) abuse to steal data from SharePoint environments. [...]
